user_request: Calculate the compound interest on $10,000 at 5% for 10 years

messages.content: Calculate the compound interest on $10,000 at 5% for 10 years
I calculated the result. With $10,000 principal at 5% annual compound interest over 10 years, you'd have $16,288.95. The total interest earned is $6,288.95.
